title: Tourism
description: UNESCO sites, museums, castles, parks, chocolate, beer experiences, day trips and hidden gems.

items.name: Historic Centre of Bruges
items.ticketInfo: Free to walk; individual sites ticketed

items.description: Belfry towers across Bruges, Ghent, Mechelen and other cities.

items.description: Major art museum complex in Brussels.

items.description: Large park with museums and a triumphal arch.

items.description: Numerous artisan chocolatiers in the historic centre.

items.name: Trappist beer cafés (sample)
items.description: Belgium's famous Trappist and abbey beer culture.

items.description: Easy 1-hour train ride for a full day of sightseeing.
